response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a promotional or concert snippet from 'hololive GAMERS fes.'. 2. Audio is a continuous track featuring Japanese vocals sung by the four characters on screen. 3. Used visual cues ('hololive GAMERS fes.', '#ゲーマーズ_day1') and listened to the lyrics ('Gamers') to identify the song. 4. Performed a search: '"We Are GAMERS!!!!" hololive lyrics Japanese and English' to obtain the lyrics and confirm the title and artist. 5. Constructed the JSON object with the identified metadata and lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video clip of a live performance by the hololive GAMERS group (Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, and Inugami Korone) at their 'hololive GAMERS fes.' event, performing their song 'We are GAMERS!!!!'.

scenes.description: The four members of hololive GAMERS perform their song 'We are GAMERS!!!!' on a neon-themed stage during their fes event.
